stemHtml: The EGPWS may propose the Terrain Look-Ahead Alerting function, this function uses…

options.a: the same caution and warning envelopes than the mode 2 GPWS (excessive terrain closure rate).
options.b: a specific radar to detect any high ground in conflict with the flight path of the aircraft.
options.c: the weather radar to detect any high ground in conflict with the flight path of the aircraft.
options.d: an electronic map of the world giving ground elevation.
